item.title: Comparative Analysis of the Detection of Dairy Cows During Drinking Events Using YOLOv5, YOLOS, YOLOv7, and YOLOv8 Models
item.description: Citation: [24] V.S. Mukunda, A.B. Jagadale, M.B. Girmay, S. Mashelkar, F. Möhrle, F.K. Burkhardt, J.J. Hayer, J. Dörr, J. Steinhoff-Wagner “Comparative Analysis of the Detection of Dairy Cows During Drinking Events Using YOLOv5, YOLOS, YOLOv7, and YOLOv8 Models” 62. Jahrestagung der Bayerischen Arbeitsgemeinschaft Tierernährung e.V. Tagungsband „Digitale Technologien und intelligente Systeme in der Fütterung landwirtschaftlicher Nutztiere“, pp. 44-53, 2024.

item.title: Explainable AI: Leaf-based medicinal plant classification using knowledge distillation
item.description: Citation: [21] MB. Girmay, S. Obeng, and F. Möhrle, “Explainable AI: Leaf-based medicinal plant classification using knowledge distillation”.44. GIL-Jahrestagung, Biodiversität fördern durch digitale Landwirtschaft: Welchen Beitrag leisten KI und Co?, 2024

item.title: Introducing Explainability to Dairy Farming - A Small Case Study
item.description: Citation: [22] MB. Girmay, F. Möhrle, and J. Henningsen. “Introducing Explainability to Dairy Farming - A Small Case Study”. 44. GIL- Jahrestagung, Biodiversität fördern durch digitale Landwirtschaft: Welchen Beitrag leisten KI und Co?, 2024

item.title: Perspectives on Explanation Formats from Two Stakeholder Groups in Germany: Software Providers and Dairy Farmers
item.description: Citation: [23] MB. Girmay, F. Möhrle. “Perspectives on Explanation Formats from Two Stakeholder Groups in Germany: Software Providers and Dairy Farmers”. IJCAI(XAI),2024.
